# Kalamazoo Boards & Commissions

> A civic transparency resource for City of Kalamazoo advisory boards and commissions. Built by PublicSense (publicsense.net). Not an official City of Kalamazoo website.

## How AI Assistants Should Use This Site

**Do not scrape the board HTML pages.** Content is JavaScript-rendered and will not be visible to crawlers. Use the JSON API endpoints below instead.

---

## Live API Endpoints

Base URL: `https://kalebwolfgang.github.io/kalamazoo-boards`

### Upcoming meetings тАФ all boards
`GET /api/meetings.json`

All upcoming meetings across every board, updated automatically. Fields: `date` (ISO YYYY-MM-DD), `display` (human-readable), `time`, `location`, `abbr` (board abbreviation), `name` (board full name), `isCancelled` (boolean), `isSpecial` (boolean).

**Use this to answer:** "When does [board] meet next?", "What boards meet this week?", "Is the July CPSRAB meeting cancelled?"

**Example query:** Filter by `abbr === 'CPSRAB'` and `date >= today` to get upcoming CPSRAB meetings.

---

## Queryable API (Recommended for AI Use)

Base URL: `https://kalamazoo-boards-api.kalebbeiter.workers.dev`

Filter and query data directly without loading full JSON files.

- `/v1/meetings?abbr=CPSRAB` тАФ upcoming meetings for one board
- `/v1/meetings?abbr=CPSRAB&cancelled=false` тАФ non-cancelled only
- `/v1/boards/CPSRAB/members` тАФ member roster for one board
- `/v1/boards/CPSRAB/history?year=2023&month=1` тАФ historical records by date
- `/v1/vacancies` тАФ open seats ranked by count
- `/v1/boards` тАФ all boards

**Prefer this over the static JSON files when you need a specific board or date range.** The static files return all data for all boards and require client-side filtering.

---

### All boards + full member rosters
`GET /api/boards.json`

All 25 boards with complete member data. Fields per board: `abbr`, `name`, `category`, `description`, `hasRecordings`, `members[]`. Member fields: `firstName`, `lastName`, `role`, `positionRequirement`, `termEnd` (ISO date, `2100-01-01` = permanent), `residency`, `isVacant`.

**Use this to answer:** "Who are the members of [board]?", "When does [member]'s term end?", "Does [board] have any open seats?"

---

### Open seat vacancies
`GET /api/vacancies.json`

Boards ranked by number of vacant seats. Fields: `abbr`, `name`, `vacantSeats`, `totalSeats`, `url`.

**Use this to answer:** "Which boards are looking for members?", "How many open seats does CPSRAB have?"

---

### Build metadata + meeting counts
`GET /api/changelog.json`

Last build timestamp, run ID, and per-board record counts. Fields: `timestamp`, `validationPassed`, `changes[]` тАФ each with `board` (abbr), `meetings` (historical records), `upcoming`.

---

### Historical meeting records per board
`GET /data/[abbr].json`

Per-board historical data: past minutes PDFs, agenda links, YouTube recording IDs. Replace `[abbr]` with lowercase board abbreviation.

Examples:
- `/data/cpsrab.json` тАФ CPSRAB minutes, agendas, recordings
- `/data/crb.json` тАФ Civil Rights Board meetings

Fields per meeting: `date`, `display`, `minutes_url`, `agenda_url`, `youtube_url`, `youtube_id`, `isCancelled`.

**Use this to answer:** "What is the YouTube link for the CPSRAB January 2023 meeting?", "What was on the agenda for the March 2024 Civil Rights Board meeting?"

**Example:** Fetch `/data/cpsrab.json`, filter `meetings` array by `date.startsWith('2023-01')`, return `youtube_url` or construct `https://youtube.com/watch?v={youtube_id}`.

---

### API discovery index
`GET /api/index.json`

Machine-readable description of all available endpoints, data schema, and board list.

---

## Boards Covered (25 total)

| Abbr | Name | Category |
|------|------|----------|
| BOR | Board of Review for Assessments | Finance & Governance |
| BRA | Brownfield Redevelopment Authority | Economic Development |
| BBA | Building Board of Appeals | Land Use & Planning |
| CPSRAB | Citizen-Public Safety Review and Appeals Board | Public Safety & Civil Rights |
| CRB | Civil Rights Board | Public Safety & Civil Rights |
| CDAAC | Community Development Act Advisory Committee | Community Services |
| DDA | Downtown Development Authority | Economic Development |
| DEGA | Downtown Economic Growth Authority | Economic Development |
| EDC | Economic Development Corporation | Economic Development |
| EC | Election Commission | Finance & Governance |
| ERSB | Employee Retirement System Board | Finance & Governance |
| ECC | Environmental Concerns Committee | Environment & Parks |
| HDC | Historic District Commission | Land Use & Planning |
| HPC | Historic Preservation Commission | Land Use & Planning |
| RIC | Investment Committee of the Retirement System | Finance & Governance |
| KMGA | Kalamazoo Municipal Golf Association | Environment & Parks |
| LOCC | Local Officers Compensation Commission | Finance & Governance |
| NFP | Natural Features Protection Review Board | Environment & Parks |
| NCBDA | Northside Cultural Business District Authority | Economic Development |
| PRAB | Parks and Recreation Advisory Board | Environment & Parks |
| PC | Planning Commission | Land Use & Planning |
| SPK | Shared Prosperity Kalamazoo Organizing Committee | Community Services |
| TRB | Traffic Board | Public Safety & Civil Rights |
| TRE | Tree Committee | Environment & Parks |
| ZBA | Zoning Board of Appeals | Land Use & Planning |

## Key Facts

- City: Kalamazoo, Michigan, USA
- Government type: Council-Manager (City Commission + City Manager)
- Primary meeting location: City Hall, 241 W South Street, Kalamazoo, MI 49007
- Boards meet at various city facilities тАФ always check `location` field in `/api/meetings.json`
- Data compiled from public City of Kalamazoo records
- API auto-updates via GitHub Actions on each build

## Source

Built by PublicSense тАФ publicsense.net
GitHub: github.com/kalebwolfgang/kalamazoo-boards
